text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! I only managed to place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But in Princess Fighter, the princess always wins in
the end...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to show everyone the powerful, elegant
form of a princess!
choice_data_list:
You're still first place when it comes to being a
princess!

You're still first place when it comes to being a
princess!
Let's win the next race for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to show everyone the powerful, elegant
form of a princess!
choice_data_list:
You're still first place when it comes to being a
princess!

You're still first place when it comes to being a
princess!
Let's win the next race for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But I can't be satisfied with this result!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The princess I aim to be is one who never gives
up! She runs ever onward, chasing after her ideals!
choice_data_list: I see. Then onward we march!
I see. Then onward we march!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Right! The path to becoming a true princess is full
of challenges, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But if I have you at my side, then I think—no! I know that I'll reach my goal!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! I won't let things end this way!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess sinks her teeth in and never lets go! In
fact, she tears it all to pieces!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry! I'll have you know that
I've got a very strong jaw!
